title: Atta Boy
writer: Charles Horan, Alfred J. Goulding, Harold Christie
actors: Monty Banks, Virginia Bradford, Ernest Wood
plot: Monty Milde, a copy boy on a large daily newspaper in New York, dreams of becoming a real reporter. On his birthday, which is April 1st (April Fool's Day), a practical joker tells him he has been promoted to being a reporter, and ...
